query:
SELECT 
  s.name,
  s.duid,
  s.latitude,
  s.longitude,
  sc.tracking_type,
  sc.axis_azimuth,
  sc.tilt_angle,
  sc.gcr,
  sc.pitch,
  sc.inverter_count,
  sc.pcu_count,
  sc.coordinate_confidence,
  sc.tracking_confidence,
  sc.gcr_confidence,
  sc.pitch_confidence,
  sc.equipment_confidence,
  sc.detection_notes,
  sc.images_analyzed,
  sc.updated_at
FROM sites s
LEFT JOIN site_configurations sc ON s.id = sc.site_id
WHERE s.duid = 'CLARESF1'
ORDER BY sc.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 1;
